heading: Duration of military protective orders
label: 1567 Duration of military protective orders
text: A military protective order issued by a military commander shall remain in effect until such time as the military commander terminates the order or issues a replacement order.
notes: Amendments2009— made technical amendment to section catchline.Pub. L. 111–84
amendments: Amendments2009— made technical amendment to section catchline.Pub. L. 111–84
